summary: First comprehensive test run of RanchoPro MVP. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major screens render correctly with Spanish UI. Minor Playwright selector issues during tab navigation, but all screens verified working via screenshots.

minor.issue: Logger initialization (lines 727-731) happens AFTER it's referenced in line 620. Should move logging setup to top of file before usage.

issues: Deprecated warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props should use 'boxShadow'
These are React Native web deprecation warnings - non-critical but should be addressed

action_items: Move logging initialization to top of server.py before first usage
Update StyleSheet to use boxShadow instead of shadow* props where possible
Update Image components to use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Environment variables correctly used throughout (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL, DB_NAME)
✓ MongoDB ObjectId (_id) properly excluded in all queries using {'_id': 0}
✓ All API endpoints properly authenticated with Bearer token
✓ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, StyleSheet)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Spanish UI implemented throughout as required
✓ Async/await properly used for all DB operations
✓ Proper HTTP status codes (200, 401, 404) with Spanish error messages
Minor: Logging setup should be moved before usage (line 620 uses logger before line 727 defines it)
seed_data_creation: Test user created in MongoDB: user_id='test-user-1772785918320', session_token='test_session_1772785918320'. Backend /api/seed endpoint successfully creates sample data (4 animals, 2 paddocks, financial records).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality working. Backend API fully tested with pytest. Frontend tested via Playwright with mobile viewport. Test user credentials: session_token='test_session_1772785918320'. Sample data exists in DB via /api/seed endpoint. Minor deprecation warnings exist but non-blocking.

coverage: Weight records (POST, GET /api/animals/{id}/weight) - verified weight updates animal
